name: Rancheros
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cheese squares on one patty.
2. Spread chili mixture over the cheese.
3. Place the second patty on top.
4. Pinch the edges of the patties together.
5. Dip the doubled, filled patty in buttermilk, then flour.
6. Repeat dipping in buttermilk and corn meal.
7. Fry until golden brown in hot oil.
8. Top with a fried egg cooked to easy-over.
9. Use oleo or butter for frying the egg.
Taken from: IT NEVER TURNS OUT THE SAME WAY COOKBOOK
A Collection of Recipes from the Kitchen of Joyce & Clem Kohl
